name: Personal or Family Use Beer Production Exclusion

eligibility.description: Applies to individuals brewing beer for personal or family consumption rather than for sale, provided they comply with the volume limits and requirements of IRC section 5053(e).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes individuals from criminal penalties and fines for brewing beer without a qualified brewery permit, provided the production is for personal or family use under section 5053(e).
